hero.headline: Stop using spreadsheets. Track your team's attendance in real time.
hero.subheadline: SystemaPonto combines secure clock events, approvals, and operational analytics in one workflow.

features.title: Everything your team needs to control attendance
features.subtitle: Mapped to actual app workflows: time entries, approvals, overtime, vacation flow, reports, and admin governance.
features.clockDesc: Capture entries, status changes, and worked-hour summaries with a reliable timeline.
features.faceDesc: Use face-api.js embeddings with guided checks before attendance actions.
features.geoDesc: Validate attendance by GPS radius or terminal QR mode with anti-replay controls.
features.approvalDesc: Approve, reject, or request edits with comments and complete audit history.
features.vacationDesc: Route requests through supervisor and HR stages, with calendar visibility.
features.reportDesc: Generate async CSV exports and monitor key indicators without blocking operations.

how.title: Three simple steps
how.step1Desc: Employees clock in from validated channels with optional facial verification.
how.step2Desc: Supervisors and admins manage pending entries, overtime alerts, and exceptions.
how.step3Desc: Use dashboards and CSV reports to drive payroll and operational decisions.

testimonials.title: Operations teams replaced manual control with confidence
testimonials.quote1: We reduced payroll disputes in the first month because each record has context and approval logs.
testimonials.quote2: Terminal QR and geolocation stopped attendance ambiguity in distributed shifts.
testimonials.quote3: Vacation workflow and overtime alerts made supervisor routines significantly faster.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how SystemaPonto collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data while providing attendance and workforce management services.
privacy.section1Body: We process account data (name, email, role), attendance records (clock-in/out timestamps, notes, status), technical metadata (IP and device information), optional geolocation coordinates, vacation and approval workflow records, and facial verification vectors generated through face-api.js. We do not store raw facial video as a persistent attendance record.
privacy.section2Body: Data is used to authenticate users via Supabase Auth, validate attendance events, support supervisor/admin approvals, calculate worked/overtime hours, process vacation requests, generate reports, and maintain system integrity and security monitoring.
privacy.section3Body: Operational records are stored in PostgreSQL and protected by role-based access controls. Authentication is handled by Supabase. We apply access logging, request metadata tracking, and least-privilege controls to reduce unauthorized access risk.
privacy.section4Body: SystemaPonto uses browser storage for session continuity, language preferences, and product behavior required for authenticated usage. These technologies are used for platform functionality, not behavioral advertising.
privacy.section5Body: Depending on jurisdiction, users may request access, correction, portability, restriction, or deletion of personal data, subject to legal and operational retention requirements. Requests can be routed through the customer account administrator.
privacy.section6Body: Attendance and audit records are retained according to contractual and legal obligations. Report exports may follow platform retention windows. Data no longer required is deleted or anonymized according to internal procedures.
privacy.section7Body: When infrastructure providers operate across regions, data may be processed in other jurisdictions under contractual safeguards and applicable data protection standards.
privacy.section8Body: For privacy requests or security concerns, contact {{email}}.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern access to and use of SystemaPonto by customer organizations and their authorized users.
terms.section1Body: You agree to use the platform only for lawful workforce and attendance management activities. Attempts to bypass security controls, scrape restricted data, or misuse authentication mechanisms are prohibited.
terms.section2Body: Customers are responsible for managing user permissions, safeguarding credentials, and ensuring that submitted attendance and workforce information is accurate and authorized.
terms.section3Body: Paid plans renew according to the selected billing cycle. Customers can cancel renewal at any time before the next billing date. Refunds, when applicable, follow the commercial policy and local mandatory consumer rights.
terms.section4Body: We aim for high availability but cannot guarantee uninterrupted service in all circumstances, including maintenance windows, third-party outages, or force majeure events.
terms.section5Body: Customers remain responsible for compliance with local labor and privacy regulations when configuring attendance, geolocation, and biometric verification policies.
terms.section6Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, SystemaPonto and its providers are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including lost profits or business interruption.
terms.section7Body: We may update these Terms periodically. Continued use after an effective update constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.section8Body: For legal or contractual questions, contact {{email}}.
